introSection: Gold Rusher is a steel roller coaster at Tatzmania Löffingen in Löffingen, Baden-Württemberg, Germany.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Gold Rusher is a Gerstlauer Bobsled Coaster.

fullText:
Gold Rusher is a steel roller coaster at Tatzmania Löffingen in Löffingen, Baden-Württemberg, Germany.

Gold Rusher is a Gerstlauer Bobsled Coaster.
